markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, strategy, and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Podcast Titles:** Alex will update YouTube titles to match optimized article titles, ensuring consistency and better SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [**Content Approval:** Alex will approve all new content proposals, prioritizing volume for the new blog and trusting Growth X's SEO-driven strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [**Case Study Article:** The upcoming article will feature Understory's outbound success (1 lead/114 contacts vs. a 1/400 benchmark). Alex will provide 3–4 more examples.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [**Performance:** The site's SEMrush Authority Score jumped from 5 to 18, a strong signal of Google relevance. Traffic from LLMs (GPT, Claude) is also increasing.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Approval

  - [**Podcast Title Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [**Problem:** Poorly written podcast titles (e.g., "stuck at 3 million ARR") hurt SEO and user engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [**Solution:** Growth X will optimize article titles in Atlas. To maintain consistency, Alex will update the corresponding YouTube video titles.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [**Example:** "stuck at 3 Millionaire Arguers" → "stuck at 3 Million ARR, had a breakthrough to 25 million+"](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [**Content Approval Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Decision:** Alex will approve all new content proposals in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Prioritize content volume for the new blog, trusting Growth X's SEO-driven strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
      - [**Guidance:** Alex's review should focus on ensuring topics are relevant to Understory's specific services.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [**Future Content Ideas:**](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
      - [Growth X will integrate Alex's content ideas into the calendar, mapping them to high-volume keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
      - [Alex will provide a blog post on Understory's internal "Allbound" process. Growth X will ensure it doesn't cannibalize existing content.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)

### Upcoming Content & Assets

  - [**ImageGen Pipeline Finalized:**](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
      - [New images with more variety and refined style will be used in this week's articles.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
      - [Growth X will refresh all past articles with the new style over the next two weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Alex suggested a white outline for green text to improve contrast. Growth X will test this.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [**"Emails to Drive Conversions" Article:**](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
      - [**Decision:** Growth X will finalize and publish the article without Alex's voice notes.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The article is "polished enough to publish" and can be optimized later, aligning with a "living site" philosophy.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [**"Data-Driven Case Studies" Article:**](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)
      - [**Action:** Alex will provide 3–4 client success examples for the upcoming article.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
      - [**Key Example:** An outbound campaign achieving 1 lead per 114 contacts, nearly 4x better than the 1/400 industry benchmark.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
      - [**Potential Headline:** "How to get a reply for 1% of every contact that sees your letter."](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)

### Performance & Optimization

  - [**Traffic & Authority Growth:**](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
      - [**Website Traffic:** Significant increase in traffic, including high-value visitors from companies like Meta.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
      - [**Authority Score:** SEMrush Authority Score jumped from 5 to 18, a strong signal of Google relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
      - [**LLM Referrals:** Traffic from GPT and Claude is increasing, indicating growing visibility in AI search.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [**Website Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
      - [Growth X does not offer website optimization as a service.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
      - [**Action:** Growth X will introduce Understory to WebStacks, a recommended partner specializing in this work.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Growth X:**](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
      - [Test a white outline for green text in new images.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [Refresh past articles with the new image style.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
      - [Optimize podcast article titles in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [Finalize and publish the "Emails to Drive Conversions" article.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
      - [Send Slack reminder to Alex for case study examples.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
      - [Introduce Understory to WebStacks.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [**Alex:**](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
      - [Update corresponding YouTube video titles.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
      - [Provide 3–4 client case study examples.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
      - [Draft the "Allbound" blog post.](https://fathom.video/share/A-3cy7CyB9Di3CPTp4Hzs8yDK-7HJc4V?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
